description.p: Jasmine is a comprehensive web launcher and session management application that transforms your scattered bookmarks and browser tabs into an organized, launchable workspace. Perfect for productivity enthusiasts and multi-account managers.

ul.li: Smart Bookmarking: Store websites with titles, URLs, comments, favicons, and login references
Session Management: Create, save, and restore multi-tab browsing sessions with one click
Private Profile System: Completely isolated browsing environments for multi-account management
Multi-Account Support: Simultaneously access multiple accounts on the same service without conflicts
Radio Stations: Browse, search, and play thousands of internet radio stations with local icon caching
IPTV Channels: Import M3U playlists, browse channels by category, and watch live TV streams
Podcast Manager: Subscribe to podcasts via iTunes search or RSS feed URL, manage episodes, and play audio
Built-in Download Manager: Complete download management with progress tracking
2FA Integration: Built-in two-factor authentication code generator
Screenshot Capture: Take and save screenshots of web pages for documentation
Master Password Protection: Secure your data with password protection

description.p: Perfect for managing multiple Gmail accounts, GitHub profiles, social media accounts, or any scenario where you need isolated browsing sessions. Each private profile operates as a separate browser with its own cookies, login sessions, and browsing data.

Whether you're a developer managing different environments, a content creator with multiple channels, or a business manager handling client accounts, Jasmine provides unprecedented control over your online identity management.

screenshot.caption: Radio Stations Tab - Browse and search thousands of internet radio stations
IPTV Tab - Import M3U playlists and watch live TV channels
Podcast Manager - Subscribe to podcasts, manage episodes, and listen to your favorite shows
Ad-Free Media Player - Watch YouTube and other videos without interruptions
Media Player Controls - Play, pause, volume, and progress controls
Fullscreen Mode - Enjoy videos in fullscreen with auto-hide controls
Main Interface with Dark Theme Showing Website Cards
Sessions view for managing and organizing browsing sessions
Sessions view with dark theme for comfortable night usage
Integrated web view for browsing websites within the application
Web view with dark theme for reduced eye strain
Extended sessions management with multiple session options
Advanced web view features and navigation options
Built-in download manager with progress tracking
Two-factor authentication manager for secure login codes

ul.li: REMOVED separator lines appearing above podcast episode items.
Added Podcasts tab: search for podcasts by name, category, or author using iTunes API.
Subscribe directly using RSS feed URL - works with any podcast host.
Import and export podcast subscriptions using OPML format for backup and migration.
Automatic episode fetching with play/stop controls, duration, and publish date.
Podcast artwork is downloaded and cached locally.
Generate custom icons for podcasts without artwork.
Collapsible comments section for personal notes.
Refresh individual podcast feeds to check for new episodes.
Added Refresh All Podcasts action in Tools menu.
Fixed episode highlight persistence when switching between podcasts.
Added Podcasts tab: search for podcasts by name, category, or author using iTunes API.
Subscribe directly using RSS feed URL - works with any podcast host.
Import and export podcast subscriptions using OPML format for backup and migration.
Automatic episode fetching with play/stop controls, duration, and publish date.
Podcast artwork is downloaded and cached locally.
Generate custom icons for podcasts without artwork.
Collapsible comments section for personal notes.
Refresh individual podcast feeds to check for new episodes.
Added Refresh All Podcasts action in Tools menu.
Fixed episode highlight persistence when switching between podcasts.
Added Radio Stations tab: browse and search thousands of internet radio stations, preview streams, and save your favorites.
Added IPTV tab: import M3U playlists from URL or local file, browse channels, and add them to your collection.
Radio and IPTV stations save icons locally and work offline after first load.
Added search button in toolbar to filter cards in any tab.
Improved dark theme support for all dialogs.
Better performance when loading large playlists (over 10,000 channels).
Fixed button states when stopping playback from player window.
Fixed duplicate detection when adding stations or channels.
Module downloads yt-dlp binary from official GitHub releases to application directory with executable permissions.
Flatpak version now works out of the box with no external dependencies.

Added standalone ad-free video player for YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, Rumble, and Odysee. Since QWebEngine doesn't support ad-block extensions and the built-in blocker cannot block YouTube ads, this provides an excellent way to watch videos without interruptions.
Uses yt-dlp backend to extract direct stream URLs, bypassing ad injection points. Native QMediaPlayer rendering with hardware acceleration.
Full video controls: play/pause, stop, volume, progress slider, fullscreen toggle, aspect ratio options, and right-click context menu. Auto-hide interface on click for maximized viewing.
One-click "Stream" button in video toolbar loads current page URL into player. Player state and volume level persist across sessions via QSettings.
Fixed orphaned yt-dlp processes when clearing URLs or closing player. Proper resource cleanup implemented.

Added "Highlight Essential Buttons" option in View menu. Dashboard/WebView switcher, Save Session, and Open Selected Website buttons are now highlightable with distinct background colors for improved usability. State persists across sessions via QSettings.
Downloads and screenshots now save directly to ~/Documents/Jasmine/Downloads and ~/Documents/Jasmine/Screenshots respectively, eliminating deep OSTree nesting.

Fixed new tab/window behavior to respect profile selection. Right-click "Open in new tab" preserves calling tab's profile (shared, private, or named) while left-clicking on links uses universal shared profile.
Implemented centralized constants file (Constants.h/cpp) to manage all application paths and shared variables across classes.
Resolved duplicate tab issue. Left-clicking on links emits a dedicated newPopupRequested signal without two or more tabs opening.This was a known bug.
Added "Disable GPU Acceleration" option in Tools menu for users experiencing graphical issues on NVIDIA systems. When enabled, applies --disable-gpu flag to QtWebEngine with restart notification.
Updated Flatpak base application to io.qt.qtwebengine.BaseApp version 6.10
Updated KDE Platform runtime to org.kde.Platform version 6.10
Increased website and session card dimensions from 180×180 to 200×200 pixels for better text space and readability.
Enhanced splitter handle visibility by increasing width and adding distinct styling for improved usability.
Performed minor code polishes and improvements.
Updated the base runtime from `org.kde.Platform` version `'6.8'` to version `'6.9'` because version 6.8 has reached its End-of-Life (EOL).
Updated the base application from `io.qt.qtwebengine.BaseApp` version `'6.8'` to version `'6.9'` to maintain compatibility with the new platform runtime.
Subclassed QWebEnginePage and created a fully functional custom context menu with enhanced functionality and improved user experience.
Ensured links opened from a tab share the same profile type as the calling tab, maintaining profile consistency across navigation and new tab operations.
Performed various code optimizations, refactoring, and maintenance improvements for better performance, stability, and maintainability.

Resolved an issue introduced with named profiles where some tabs were not saved or displayed with the correct profile when saving sessions. Now, tabs are reliably saved and shown with their associated profile—Shared Universal, Named, or Private—according to the UI profile settings at launch time.

Improved security dialogs and user experience: All security-related dialogs (master password setup, password protection toggle) now include a Cancel button and properly abort the operation if Cancel or the window close (X) is pressed. This ensures that no unintended changes occur if the user cancels at any step, and toggle actions are always reverted if the process is not completed.
Added pulseaudio permission to the Flatpak manifest, enabling sound playback in the application.
Implemented full screen functionality for embedded and standalone videos, enhancing the media viewing experience.
Added a toolbar action and F11 shortcut to instantly open a copied link from the clipboard in a new tab.
Performed various code improvements and optimizations for better performance, stability, and maintainability.
Named Shared Profiles: Implemented contextual browsing environments allowing multiple tabs to share the same browsing context under meaningful labels like "Work," "Home," or "Research"
Integrated Ad Blocker: Added comprehensive ad blocking functionality that can be toggled on/off via Tools menu
Enhanced Browser Headers: Implemented custom request interceptor with standardized headers for consistent browsing experience
Profile Management Tools: Added profile manager dialog for creating, deleting, and cleaning profiles with safety checks
UI Improvements: Added visual indicators for active profile and enhanced profile switching experience
Implemented a new symlink-based storage system that dramatically reduces disk space usage
Profile data now uses symbolic links instead of copying entire directories, improving performance and efficiency
Added progress bar when saving sessions for better visual feedback and to prevent premature closure
Implemented automatic cleanup of orphaned profile directories at startup (configurable in Tools menu)
Added help documentation explaining the new storage system benefits and recommendations - users are kindly advised to read it carefully
Added fully functional URL bar with toggle visibility via eye icon in toolbar
New feature to create website cards directly from the currently loaded URL
Set dashboard to fixed size while keeping web view resizable for improved visual quality
Fixed website card update button connection to proper slot function
Improved theme handling for help menu items with temporary light theme switching
Fixed critical QWebEngineView resizing bugs affecting display and performance
Enhanced overall application layout with better size management

description.p: Initial release of Jasmine Website and Session Manager

ul.li: Smart bookmarking system with favicon and login reference support
Complete session management with multi-tab restoration
Private profile system for isolated browsing environments
Multi-account support for simultaneous access to same services
Built-in download manager with progress tracking
Two-factor authentication (2FA) code generator
Screenshot capture functionality
Master password protection with SHA-256 encryption
Data management and privacy controls
Cross-platform Qt-based interface
